title: Isolate fold fridge internal config per equipment instance
goal: Prevent fold_fridge and four_box_fridge internal panel config from being shared across equipment instances in the admin editor.
constraints: Fix in admin editor state/config flow only
Do not modify game/runtime files unless a new blocker is proven from code
Do not change DB schema or SQL
Do not shallow-copy equipment.config during duplication
Ensure nested basketConfig is also detached
acceptance: Adding a second fold_fridge from the palette starts with an empty internal panel state
Duplicating a fold_fridge copies the current internal snapshot but later edits do not affect the original
The same isolation holds for four_box_fridge
A edits never appear in B, and B edits never appear in A
